title: Human-checkpoint workflow (approve/modify/halt) with cycle diff + coverage delta + cost summary
context: The human gate must be informed, not a rubber stamp. This safety-critical M2 task builds the checkpoint workflow that presents a cycle diff, coverage delta, and cost summary so a human can approve, modify, or halt the next round, with no round advancing without an explicit, logged human action.
objective: Implement the human-checkpoint workflow: at each checkpoint a human can approve / modify / halt the next round, presented with a cycle diff, coverage delta, and cost summary, where no round advances without an explicit, logged human decision (no auto-advance).
acceptanceCriteria: At each checkpoint a human can approve / modify / halt the next round; the workflow presents a cycle diff, coverage delta, and cost summary for an informed decision
No round advances without an explicit human action (no auto-advance); the decision is logged
Reviewed and signed off by the maintainer + gate reviewer (recorded)
